name: AngleDimension
summary: The AngleDimension class defines an angle dimension between two lines. The dimension can be shown by a triangle or in degrees. You can also enter the triangle base length.

constructors.name: AngleDimension
constructors.signature: public AngleDimension(ViewBase View, Point Origin, Point Point1, Point Point2, double Distance)
constructors.summary: Creates a new angle dimension instance using three points.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: Origin
params.doc: The origin to be used.

params.name: Point1
params.doc: The first point to be used.

params.name: Point2
params.doc: The second point to be used.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance of the angle sign from the origin to the first point.

constructors.name: AngleDimension
constructors.signature: public AngleDimension(ViewBase View, Point Origin, Vector Vector1, Vector Vector2, double Distance)
constructors.summary: Creates a new angle dimension instance using the origin and two vectors relative to the origin.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: Origin
params.doc: The origin to be used.

params.name: Vector1
params.doc: The first vector to be used.

params.name: Vector2
params.doc: The second vector to be used.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance to be used.

params.doc: The angle dimension attributes to be used.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the dimension from the database.

returns.doc: True if the deletion succeeds.

methods.name: GetAngle
methods.summary: Gets the angle value (in degrees).

returns.doc: The angle value.

methods.summary: The angle dimension doesn't have a dimension set.

returns.doc: An exception.

methods.name: GetDimensionSet(Boolean)
methods.summary: The angle dimension doesn't have a dimension set.

params.doc: Whether to select the object from the database or not.

returns.doc: An exception.

methods.name: GetUserProperty(String, Double.)
methods.signature: public bool GetUserProperty(string Name, ref double Value)
methods.summary: Gets a double property from the drawing object. The object has to be in a drawing before the method can be used.

params.doc: The value of the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was gotten successfully.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the angle dimension attributes.

properties.name: Distance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the distance (from the origin to the second point's direction). The distance is measured in paper millimeters.

properties.name: Hideable
properties.summary: Accesses the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.

properties.name: Origin
properties.summary: Gets or sets the origin of the dimension.

properties.name: Point1
properties.summary: Gets or sets the first point.

properties.name: Point2
properties.summary: Gets or sets the second point.

properties.name: QueryReturnValue
properties.summary: Status information about the latest database operation (select, insert, modify, delete).
